description.en: Create a new post on Bluesky using the AT Protocol.
description.de: Einen neuen Beitrag auf Bluesky über das AT Protocol erstellen.
description.es: Create a new post on Bluesky using the AT Protocol.
description.fr: Create a new post on Bluesky using the AT Protocol.
description.ro: Create a new post on Bluesky using the AT Protocol.
description.it: Create a new post on Bluesky using the AT Protocol.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:BLUESKY_ACCESS_TOKEN|Get your access token from Bluesky app settings

inputs.name: Handle

description.en: Your Bluesky handle or DID (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').
description.es: Your Bluesky handle or DID (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').
description.fr: Your Bluesky handle or DID (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').
description.ro: Your Bluesky handle or DID (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').
description.it: Your Bluesky handle or DID (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').

inputs.bot: The user's Bluesky handle (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social') or DID (e.g., 'did:plc:xyz123'). This identifies the account creating the post.

inputs.name: Text

description.en: The text content of the post (max 300 characters).
description.es: The text content of the post (max 300 characters).
description.fr: The text content of the post (max 300 characters).
description.ro: The text content of the post (max 300 characters).
description.it: The text content of the post (max 300 characters).

inputs.bot: The text content of the Bluesky post. Maximum 300 characters.

inputs.name: Created At
inputs.bot: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the post was created. Uses {{NOW}} template variable if supported, otherwise provide a timestamp like '2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z'.
